description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named lint-and-test that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Run four ubuntu-latest jobs in parallel: lint-docs, lint-code, lint-style, and test. Each job checks out the repository, sets up a specific version of Python, installs tox, and then runs a tox command. The test job runs on multiple Python versions, while the others run on Python 3.8.
